title: Lunathyrium conilii
taxonomy: Lunathyrium conilii is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to Europe and Asia. The classification of Lunathyrium conilii includes being in the kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Athyriales. This plant is further divided into the family Athyriaceae and genus Lunathyrium. The specific epithet 'conilii' is often used to honor the French botanist Jacques Constant Eugène Conil.

The plant is said to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with various conditions.
